title: Magnet Explorer
description: An early materials-science sorting game where kids test what sticks to a magnet.
learningGoals: Sort objects by magnetic and non-magnetic behavior
Connect sticking to metal objects in everyday examples
Practice observation language for early materials science
interactionModel: sort-into-bins drag or tap-tap object cards into sticks and does-not-stick bins
feedbackModel: Correct sorts get pop and sparkle SFX plus spoken praise; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry.
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
